exercises.audioScript: Does he have to come too?
exercises.hindiScript: क्या उसे भी आना पड़ता है?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We have to fill the form.
You have to take permission.
He has to complete this work.
Does he have to come too?
exercises.answer: Does he have to come too?

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You do not have to do this.
We have to follow safety rules.
We have to follow the rules.
We have to pay tax.

exercises.audioScript: I have to give this test.
exercises.hindiScript: मुझे यह test देना पड़ता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She has to give proof.
She has to make this decision.
She has to wake up early every day.
I have to give this test.
exercises.answer: I have to give this test.

exercises.audioScript: He has to take medicine daily.
exercises.hindiScript: उसे रोज़ दवा लेनी पड़ती है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Does he have to come too?
I have to show my ID.
Do you have to do this?
He has to take medicine daily.
exercises.answer: He has to take medicine daily.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We have to pay tax.
Do you have to pay fees?
He has to work very hard.
You have to take permission.

exercises.audioScript: We have to follow safety rules.
exercises.hindiScript: हमें सुरक्षा नियमों का पालन करना पड़ता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I have to give this test.
He has to take this responsibility.
I have to pay this money.
We have to follow safety rules.
exercises.answer: We have to follow safety rules.

exercises.audioScript: She has to make this decision.
exercises.hindiScript: उसे यह decision लेना पड़ता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He has to take medicine daily.
I have to go to office every day.
We have to fill the form.
She has to make this decision.
exercises.answer: She has to make this decision.

exercises.audioScript: I have to show my ID.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You have to take permission.
He has to complete this work.
You do not have to do this.
I have to show my ID.
exercises.answer: I have to show my ID.

dictationPassage.text: Does he have to come too? We have to pay tax. I have to give this test. He has to take medicine daily. You have to take permission.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: क्या उसे भी आना पड़ता है? हमें टैक्स भरना पड़ता है। मुझे यह test देना पड़ता है। उसे रोज़ दवा लेनी पड़ती है। तुम्हें अनुमति लेनी पड़ती है।
